hemin-patel.description: Hemin is a senior SEO & digital marketing strategist focusing on GEO, AEO, and LLMO for growth-stage brands.

ankit-patel.description: With over 10 years of experience in advertising and branding, Ankit Patel is a digital marketing specialist with a master’s degree in e-business from Vallabh Vidyanagar, Anand. Passionate about digital media, he excels in crafting strategic marketing plans, managing social media accounts, and leveraging #technicalSEO to boost organic visibility and drive business growth. Ankit’s creative strategies and data-driven approach help businesses elevate their brand presence, attract qualified traffic, and achieve measurable results.

adhi-patel.description: Adhi Patel is a creative content writer who crafts engaging and meaningful stories that connect with readers. Passionate about words, she transforms ideas into impactful narratives that resonate with diverse audiences.

dax-patel.description: Dax Patel is an SEO Executive with a passion for helping businesses grow online. He specializes in creating smart, data-driven SEO strategies that improve website visibility, boost traffic, and drive real results.With hands-on experience in on-page SEO, off-page SEO, content planning, and analytics, Dax stays up to date with the latest trends to deliver effective and practical solutions for his clients.Outside of work, Dax loves exploring new technologies, traveling to new places, and studying about entrepreneurship. He enjoys learning continuously and believes in combining creativity with dedication in everything he does.

manish-rohit.description: Manish Rohit, Digital Marketing Strategist with over 11 years of experience helping 50+ businesses grow through data-driven SEO, PPC, and content marketing strategies. Coming from humble beginnings, Manish built his career from the ground up-turning persistence, passion, and purpose into powerful results for brands across healthcare, fashion, real estate, IT, e-commerce, and tourism. For Manish, digital marketing goes beyond rankings and clicks, it’s about empowering business owners to achieve real, sustainable growth. His mission is to craft strategies that not only perform on paper but create lasting impact in the real world.

vrushil-parekh.description: Vrushil Parekh is a skilled Mobile App Developer with over 2.5 years of experience, specializing in crafting dynamic, end-to-end mobile solutions. With hands-on expertise in Flutter and Laravel, he delivers seamless, scalable, and user-friendly applications convert to business goals.  He has successfully handled complete development cycles from concept to deployment ensuring each project exceeds expectations.Beyond code, Vrushil enjoys exploring creative ideas, learning new technologies, and turning every challenge into innovation. His calm, professional approach and dedication to excellence make him a reliable force in every project he undertakes.

het-patel.description: Het Patel is a Graphic and UI/UX Designer who enjoys turning simple ideas into clean and meaningful designs. He works mainly on branding and user-friendly interfaces, focusing on clarity and purpose.He keeps an eye on design trends but believes in using them thoughtfully, making sure every design feels modern and truly practical for real users. His goal is always the same to make designs that look good and work well.When he’s not designing, you’ll probably find him playing cricket or spending time with friends, which helps him recharge and stay creative.

het-chunara.description: Het Chunara is a Frontend Developer specializing in React.js, Next.js, and WordPress, with over 1.5+ years of hands-on experience building modern, responsive, and user-centric web applications. Het has worked across multiple client projects, transforming UI/UX designs into clean, high-performance front-end solutions. Over the last year, he has also gained strong expertise in customizing WordPress themes, integrating plugins, and improving website speed and SEO. Known for writing structured, maintainable code and collaborating effectively with design and backend teams, Het focuses on building digital experiences that are both visually appealing and technically optimized for real-world performance and scalability.

krupa-zala.description: Krupa Zala is a Graphic Designer known for her creativity, attention to detail, and love for visual storytelling. She creates attractive and meaningful designs that help brands share their message clearly across both digital and print platforms.With her creative ideas and innovative thinking, Krupa delivers designs that make brands stand out and connect better with their audience. Her passion for design and focus on quality make her an important part of any creative team.In her free time, she enjoys traveling and playing badminton, which inspire her and bring new ideas to her work. Her positive attitude, creativity, and dedication are admired by both clients and colleagues.
